title: Remove Conditional Coloring Based on Event
excerpt: It would be great to be able to remove the conditional coloring of a cell/row based on an event. So basically set the color back to white (no color) IF something happens.

posts.author: amandalima (Amanda Lima)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to remove the conditional coloring of a cell/row based on an event. So basically set the color back to white (no color) IF something happens.
